name: Morning Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out cantaloupe with a melonballer and place the balls in a bowl. You should have about 2 cups. Pour any cantaloupe juice into the bowl.
2. Peel kiwi fruit. Cut crosswise into thin slices, then quarter the slices. Add to the cantaloupe.
3. Set aside 4 of the most attractive strawberries for garnish. Hull and slice enough strawberries lengthwise to make 1 cup. Place in the bowl.
4. Add raspberries.
5. Sprinkle fruit salad with chopped mint leaves and drizzle with orange juice.
6. Toss gently.
7. Refrigerate, covered, for 1/2 hour for flavors to blend together.
8. Divide salad among 4 bowls. Garnish each with a whole strawberry and a sprig of mint.
